productDisplayName: Nike Women Dart 9 MSL Grey Sports Shoes
description: Created to give a great running experience, the nike women's Dart 9 MSL running shoe is a top performer. Plush cushioning and great flexibility combine in this sneaker that stands up to everyday wear and tear.UpperBreathable mesh upper with stylish overlays give support and shoe structureHighly padded mesh collar and tongue offering exceptional comfort and breathabilityLace-up system for a snug FitMidsoleFoam midsole for ultra-lightweight, springy cushioning and soft, responsive shock absorptionDynamic Support system to adapt to your stridePadded footbed for all-day comfortOutsoleNon-marking rubber outsole for durabilityRaised lugs and deep grooves for maximum traction, with a scooped heel for extra cushioningFlex grooves at the outsole for a more natural range of motion and enhanced flexibilityShoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
